The CLIPVitClassifier class needs to be updated to support the freeze_backbone parameter, and I need to ensure that the model architecture is consistent between training and prediction.

Decision: I'll update the CLIPVitClassifier class in model.py to accept the freeze_backbone parameter and handle it appropriately. Then I'll ensure that the model is saved and loaded consistently.
